zh.Toledo, Castilla-La Mancha, Espanha: 西班牙卡斯利亞-拉 曼哈托萊多
zh.New Castille, Spain: 西班牙劍橋大學默里 卡斯利
zh.lifeSummary: 當Pedro Gomez de Barroso於大約1227年出生在葡萄牙時，他的父親Gómez Viegas de Basto Barroso48歲，母親Mór Rodrigues de Gandarei49歲。他於大約1252年與Chamoa Fernández de Acevedo在西班牙劍橋大學默里 卡斯利結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和5個女兒的父母。他去世於1258年享年32歲。

zh-hans.Toledo, Castilla-La Mancha, Espanha: 西班牙卡斯利亞-拉 曼哈托萊多
zh-hans.New Castille, Spain: 西班牙劍橋大學默里 卡斯利
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Pedro Gomez de Barroso于大约1227年出生在葡萄牙时，他的父亲Gómez Viegas de Basto Barroso48岁，母亲Mór Rodrigues de Gandarei49岁。他于大约1252年与Chamoa Fernández de Acevedo在西班牙劍橋大學默里 卡斯利结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和5个女儿的父母。他去世于1258年享年32岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Barroso
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Juan, Luis, Jorge, Manuel, Jesus, Mario, Fernando, Francisco, Angel, Carlos, Jose Luis.  Portuguese Joao, Joaquim, Margarida, Paulo.
Galician and Portuguese: topographic name for someone who lived in an area of clay or loamy soil, from barroso ‘clayey, loamy’ (from barro ‘loam’).

variants.name: Barrozo
meanings: Galician and Portuguese: variant of   Barroso  .

nameMeanings.name: Pedro
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Peter
meanings: form of the name of the best-known of all Christ's apostles, traditionally regarded as the founder of the Christian Church. The name derives, via Latin, from Greek petros ‘stone, rock’. This is used as a translation of the Aramaic byname Cephas, given to the apostle Simon son of Jona, to distinguish him from another of the same name ( Simon Zelotes ). ‘When Jesus beheld him, he said, Thou art Simon the son of Jona: thou shalt be called Cephas, which is by interpretation, A stone’ (John 1:42). According to Matthew 16:17–18, Christ says more explicitly, ‘Blessed art thou, Simon Bar-jona … thou art Peter, and upon this rock I will build my church’. The name has been in continuous use since the Middle Ages.

nameMeanings.name: Gomez
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Biblical name (meaning ‘complete’ in Hebrew), borne by a son of Japheth and grandson of Noah. It is in occasional use in the United States. Gomer is also an English surname, derived from an Old English personal name composed of gōd ‘good’ + mǣr ‘famous’, and the given name may also be a transferred use of this.

en.lifeSummary: When Pedro Gomez de Barroso was born about 1227, in Portugal, his father, Gómez Viegas de Basto Barroso, was 48 and his mother, Mór Rodrigues de Gandarei, was 49. He married Chamoa Fernández de Acevedo about 1252, in New Castile, Spain. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 5 daughters. He died in 1258, at the age of 32.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Pedro Gomez de Barroso est né environ 1227, à Portugal, son père, Gómez Viegas de Basto Barroso, avait 48 ans et sa mère, Mór Rodrigues de Gandarei, avait 49 ans. Il a épousé Chamoa Fernández de Acevedo environ 1252, à New Castile, Espagne. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 5 filles. Il est décédé en 1258, à l’âge de 32 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Pedro Gomez de Barroso um 1227 in Portugal geboren wurde, war sein Vater Gómez Viegas de Basto Barroso 48 und seine Mutter Mór Rodrigues de Gandarei 49. Er hat um 1252 in New Castile, Spanien Chamoa Fernández de Acevedo geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Er starb 1258 im Alter von 32 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Pedro Gomez de Barroso è nato il circa 1227 nel Portogallo, il suo padre, Gómez Viegas de Basto Barroso, aveva 48 anni e il suo madre, Mór Rodrigues de Gandarei, aveva 49 anni. Lui sposato Chamoa Fernández de Acevedo circa 1252, nel New Castile, Spagna. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 5 figlie. Morì nel 1258, all'età di 32 anni.

ja.Toledo, Castilla-La Mancha, Espanha: スペインカスティラ-ラ マンチャトーレド
ja.New Castille, Spain: スペインニュー カスティル
ja.Andalusia, Spain: スペインアンダルクiア
ja.lifeSummary: Pedro Gomez de Barrosoが約1227年にポルトガルで生まれた時，父Gómez Viegas de Basto Barrosoは48歳，母Mór Rodrigues de Gandareiは49歳であった。約1252年にスペインニュー カスティルでChamoa Fernández de Acevedoと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼は1258年に32歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Pedro Gomez de Barroso(이)가 대략 1227년 포르투갈에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Gómez Viegas de Basto Barroso(은)는 48세였고, 그의 어머니 Mór Rodrigues de Gandarei(은)는 49세였다. 그는 대략 1252년 스페인 뉴 카스틸에서 Chamoa Fernández de Acevedo(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1258년 32세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Pedro Gomez de Barroso nasceu aproximadamente 1227, em Portugal, seu pai, Gómez Viegas de Basto Barroso, tinha 48 anos e sua mãe, Mór Rodrigues de Gandarei, tinha 49 anos. Ele casou-se com Chamoa Fernández de Acevedo aproximadamente 1252, em New Castile, Espanha. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 5 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1258, com 32 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Pedro Gomez de Barroso родился около 1227 г. в местности Португалия, его отцу по имени Gómez Viegas de Basto Barroso было 48 лет, а матери, которую звали Mór Rodrigues de Gandarei, 49. Он женился на женщине по имени Chamoa Fernández de Acevedo около 1252 г. в местности ню кастиль, Испания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 5 дочерей. Он умер в 1258 г. в возрасте 32 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Pedro Gomez de Barroso nació aproximadamente 1227, en Portugal, su papá, Gómez Viegas de Basto Barroso, tenía 48 años y su mamá, Mór Rodrigues de Gandarei, tenía 49 años. Se casó con Chamoa Fernández de Acevedo aproximadamente 1252, en New Castile, España. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió en 1258, a la edad de 32 años.
